findings.title: Uppercase-prefixed IDs are rejected via the canonical-pattern check, not the prefix check
findings.evidence: Claude confirmed every noncanonical form is rejected fail-closed; the difference is error-message taxonomy only.
findings.recommendation: No closeout action required. Optional future message-precision cleanup may split uppercase from missing-prefix messages.

findings.title: S02 contract scope_policy enumerates only does_not_implement_HermesGate
findings.evidence: Claude confirmed later-entity deferral is covered by packet non_goals, registry future markers, and tests; this mirrors the S01 scope-policy pattern.
findings.recommendation: No closeout action required. Optional consistency improvement only.

parsed_review.review_notes: Independent C00 read-only review confirmed RP00.P01.M02.S02 implements only the AIControlRule primary identifier slice, keeps the S01 AIControlRule model production_ready, defers tenant scope field to RP00.P01.M02.S03, claims no later entities or parent closeouts, uses no real data, writes no product state, and enforces canonical air_ lowercase snake-case IDs through normalizeAIControlRuleId, validateAIControlRuleId, validateAIControlRule, createAIControlRule, fixture evidence, tests, and the RP00 validator. No P0/P1/P2 findings remain. Production_ready promotion is allowed after recording this review, adjudication, construction inspection, and rerunning local validations.
